title: Legends Gather(outdated)
description: This mod add Gather Mechanic from Minecraft Legends.
body:
# Legends Gather

 

## Summary

This mod is add Gather Mechanic for Allay from Minecraft Legends

Allay help mining for you!

 

## How to use it?
first you need to craft gather allay spawner
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wXpB3SBQ/images/1c0afc9fdd283a0e16250c318c20ded89687ab06.png)

need Iron Ingot * 7 + vex script(Evoker drop this!) * 1 + IronPickaxe* 1

and with gather allay spawner. you should right shift click with allay.

then yay! you captured your partner!

 

 

you can right click spawner and summon the gather allay!

This will be very helpfull for gather material. but sadly harder material cannot gather for allay(such as obsidian and netherite)

If you want put back allay in spawner. you should right shift click

 

Happy mining!
